expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly includes all three required focus areas: (1) dashboard-level path and distinction: "Dashboard export — Google Sheets" and scenario "Distinguish dashboard-level Google Sheets export path vs other export entry points (path identity)"; (2) option combinations: "Google Sheets export option combinations are selectable from the dashboard-level export flow" with steps selecting "a non-default combination of available options"; (3) visible completion outcomes: scenarios verify visible states "export started / in progress", "export completed", and failure "export failed".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Output matches Phase 4a scenario-draft style: result.md is titled "Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (Subcategory-only)" and is organized by subcategories (e.g., "Dashboard export — Google Sheets", "Export UX strings and UI consistency") with atomic nested steps and observable verification leaves (e.g., "Verify Google Sheets is listed", "A visible 'export completed' outcome appears", "Any surfaced error message is visible"). execution_notes.md also states: "Alignment with phase contract (phase4a) - Output is subcategory-first... Scenarios are written with atomic nested steps and observable verification leaves."
